title: Elder Abuse Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Elder Abuse Shelters 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MAYDAY INC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a confidential hotline for survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, and elder abuse. Services include emergency shelter, assistance with filing restraining orders, transportation to healthcare facilities and court, advocacy, and legal support. Additional services include information and referrals, community education, training programs, and court advocacy. 1705 Main Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis line hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 523-4134 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MAYDAY INC MAYDAY INC
